name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions a hardened Nginx reverse proxy with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test, ci, status), including self-signed TLS certificate generation, global security hardening (fail2ban, UFW firewall, sysctl tuning), and SSH daemon hardening. Also includes a custom lineinfile LWRP for in-place file editing.

name: cache
description: Installs and configures a dual in-memory caching layer using Memcached (via the community memcached cookbook) and Redis (via the community redisio cookbook) with password authentication. Includes a ruby_block post-processing workaround to strip deprecated Redis config directives that cause startup failures on newer Redis versions.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a Python FastAPI application cloned from GitHub into a Python virtual environment managed by uvicorn, backed by a locally provisioned PostgreSQL database, and managed as a systemd service. Handles system package installation, DB bootstrapping, .env secret injection, and service unit management.
